title: sida hastifolia
intro: Sida hastifolia, also known as the prickly sida or stiff caltrop, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Sida hastifolia include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Sida hastifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of forms.
